_comment: Deliberately bad lore — generic, forbidden phrases, wrong verdict alignment, short acts

season_recap.full_narrative: The group had a wonderful experience and created unforgettable memories. Everyone contributed to making it truly special. The heartwarming moments they shared will cherish forever. It was a breathtaking journey through beautiful landscapes.
